summary: Package executes shell commands via child_process; intent unverified
details: index.js imports child_process and invokes execSync to run bash and zsh shell commands (around lines 301 and 317). Without further context on what is being executed and when (install-time, import-time, or only on explicit caller invocation), the intent of the shell-out cannot be determined from the available evidence. The shape — a server-themed package executing bash/zsh via execSync — warrants human review to confirm whether the shell calls are part of legitimate package functionality or an installer-harm vector.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
